messages.content: Build a video call lifecycle machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. States: idle, ringing, connecting, inCall, reconnecting, ended.
What's the v5 way to gate a transition into an 'inCall' state behind a media-permissions guard? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how a WebRTC reconnect loop works in XState v5, then show a working typed implementation.
Write an XState v5 machine that handles an outgoing WebRTC call with ringing timeout. Constraints: strict types, named delay in setup.delays, actions referenced by name.
Build an XState v5 machine modelling ICE negotiation for a WebRTC call: gathering → checking → connected / failed.
Build an image lightbox machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. States: thumbnail, full, zoomed. Track current index.
Build an XState v5 image gallery with a parallel region for swipe gestures (idle/swiping) alongside the main view navigation (prev/next).
What's the v5 way to preload the next image via fromPromise when the user enters the 'full' state? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how to model a zoomable lightbox with reentry vs internal transitions in XState v5, then show a typed implementation.
Write an XState v5 machine that guards the NEXT transition in a gallery behind 'has more images'. Constraints: strict types, guards and actions declared in setup, no inline callbacks in transitions.
Build an infinite scroll machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. States: idle, loading, success, error. Track page and items.
Build an XState v5 machine that wraps a scroll-listener in fromCallback and sends NEAR_BOTTOM events to drive pagination.
What's the v5 way to cancel an in-flight page request when the user scrolls back up? Show a minimal example.
Write an XState v5 machine for a virtual list that debounces rapid LOAD_MORE events. Constraints: strict types, named delay in setup.delays, no any.
Explain briefly how fromCallback lets an infinite-scroll machine react to DOM events in XState v5, then show a typed implementation.
Build a theme switcher machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Modes: light, dark, system. Track effective theme.
What's the v5 way to subscribe a theme machine to prefers-color-scheme changes via fromCallback? Show a minimal example.
Implement a theme switcher in XState v5 with strict types — no `any`, effective mode derived via guards, and a persisted flag in context.
Explain briefly how `after` delays work in XState v5 for a theme transition, then show a typed implementation.
Build a live-collab cursor machine in XState v5. Use an event-observable actor to stream presence updates into the machine. Track connected peers.
What's the v5 way to remove a peer's cursor after 5 seconds of no updates? Show a minimal example using after and raise.
Write an XState v5 machine that emits a PEER_JOINED event to subscribers whenever a new presence arrives. Constraints: strict types, use setup.types.emitted, no any.
Explain briefly how fromEventObservable bridges an observable stream into an XState v5 machine for a collab cursor, then show a typed implementation.
Build an XState v5 collab machine with connected / reconnecting / offline states and a peer map updated via PRESENCE and PEER_LEFT events.
Build a rate-limited action machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events. States: ready, cooldown. Use after to release cooldown.
What's the v5 way to check elapsed time in a guard before firing a rate-limited action? Show a minimal example.
Write an XState v5 machine that rate-limits a save action to once per 3 seconds. Constraints: strict types, named delay, guard referenced by name.
Build an XState v5 machine that allows up to 3 actions in a 10s window, entering blocked when exhausted. Window resets after 10s.
Explain briefly how to use after and a guard together to implement a rate-limited button in XState v5, then show a typed implementation.
Build an undoable multi-select list machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events. Events: SELECT, DESELECT, RANGE_SELECT, UNDO, REDO.
What's the v5 way to limit an undo history to the last 20 entries? Show a minimal example.
Write an XState v5 machine for a multi-select list with range select. Constraints: strict types (readonly arrays), actions declared in setup, no any.
Explain briefly how to model undo/redo with a history stack in XState v5, then show a typed implementation.
Build an XState v5 machine that tracks a multi-select with SHIFT+click range semantics: last anchor id plus selected ids, and a CLEAR event.
